name: Tujague's Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. In a glass mixing bowl, beat the eggs and blend in the sugar, syrup, butter, vanilla, salt, Armagnac, and pecans until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
4. Bake for 10 minutes at 400°F.
5. Lower the oven temperature to 350°F and bake an additional 30 minutes or until a wooden skewer or knife inserted into the center of the pie comes out clean.
6. Cool on a wire rack before serving.
